rulings.Case Title: OCEAN VIEW SCHOOL DISTRICT VS. STATE BOARD OF EDUCATION
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION LACK OF STANDING OVERRULED. 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION REGULATIONS VIOLATE ADMINSTRATIVE PROCEDURES ACT OVERRULE. 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION REGULATIONS GO BEYOND DELEGATED AUTHORITY SUSTAINED AS TO INJUNCTIVE RELIEF. 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION VIOLATION OF CONSTITUTIONAL RIGHTS OVERRULE. 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION WRIT OF MANDATE OVERRULE. 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION VIOLATION OF 42 USC 1983 CIVIL RIGHTS SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. (302/AJR/RS)
